label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 15

extraction.one_line_summary: COSTA Rui won a three-up sprint after mind games with BUTRAGO and KEMNA, who crashed late then recovered.
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma marked SOLAIRE specifically after his previous stage win here, revealing their memory-based threat assessment approach.
EVENEPOEL collected mountain points deliberately despite breakaway being his secondary objective, signaling KOM competition as fallback goal.
KEMNA bridged to leaders after DENZ was marked too dangerous, showing team willingness to sacrifice higher-placed riders tactically.
COSTA used sustained psychological warfare with both BUTRAGO and KEMNA on final climb to soften rivals before sprint.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: lacked resources on final climb compared to previous aggressive riding, suggesting selective energy management before rest day
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: crashed again with burst gels suggesting handling vulnerability that persists despite experience
rider_signals.DENZ Nico: neutral: marked too dangerous by peloton to stay in break despite teammate KEMNA allowed forward, revealing GC threat assessment
rider_signals.KEMNA Lenny: negative: misjudged corner badly enough to crash while holding winning position, then lost sprint after recovery
rider_signals.BUTRAGO Santiago: negative: fell victim to COSTA's psychological tactics despite being physically present in winning move
